$roomCode..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.child('roomMakerUid').val() === auth.uid : data.child('roomMakerUid').val() === auth.uid)

gameState..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === data.parent().child('roomMakerUid').val() || auth.uid === data.child('currentTurnPlayerId').val() || (!data.exists() && auth.uid === data.parent().child('roomMakerUid').val()))

$playerId..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $playerId || auth.uid === root.child('rooms/' + $roomCode + '/roomMakerUid').val() || auth.uid === root.child('rooms/' + $roomCode + '/gameState/currentTurnPlayerId').val())
